current.headline: Real business platforms, owned by you. Built in 14 days.
current.subhead: Day14 builds you a complete branded business platform — marketing site, customer portal, billing, admin app, AI chatbot — in 14 days. Fixed price. You own the code, the domain, the data. Not a SaaS subscription. Not a Squarespace template. A real product, with your name on the repo.

voice_notes: Specific numbers (14 days, fixed price, 3 SKUs).
Leads with ownership (your repo, your domain, your data).

headline_variants.headline: Two weeks to a real product. Yours, top to bottom.
headline_variants.rationale: Leads with the timeline, ends on ownership — keeps both pillars without restating the current line.

headline_variants.headline: Stop renting your stack. Own the whole platform in 14 days.
headline_variants.rationale: Direct anti-SaaS framing. Verb-first, with the timeline as the proof.

headline_variants.headline: A whole branded business platform. Built in 14 days. Owned by you.
headline_variants.rationale: Three-beat structure mirrors the current line but trades the abstract 'real' for the more concrete 'whole'.

subhead_variants.subhead: Marketing site, customer portal, billing, admin, AI chatbot — Day14 ships the full stack at a fixed price. Your repo, your domain, your data. No SaaS lock-in. No 9-month agency timeline.
subhead_variants.rationale: Lists the stack first so a skimmer sees the scope, then re-asserts ownership and ends on the two anti-positions.

subhead_variants.subhead: One operator, one fixed price, 14 days. We ship the marketing site, the customer portal, the billing flow, the admin app, and the AI chatbot — and hand you the keys.
subhead_variants.rationale: Cadence-first opener (3 ones), with 'hand you the keys' standing in for the ownership claim.

subhead_variants.subhead: Day14 turns your business into software in two weeks. Productized SKUs, fixed pricing, your name on the repo when we're done.
subhead_variants.rationale: Tighter. Trades the explicit stack list for a clearer pitch line, ends on the ownership proof.
